languages.text: "Я тут вам не помощник. Нужно идти в Клеть. Это наш лагерь, самый большой на Заркове, считай, столица. Или как вы там большие поселения зовете..."
"I'm no help to you there. You need to head to the Cage. It's our camp and the biggest outpost on Zarkov. Our capital, I suppose, or whatever it is you call large settlements."
languages.original_text: "Я тут вам не помощник. Нужно идти в Клеть. Это наш лагерь, самый большой на Заркове, считай, столица. Или как вы там большие поселения зовете..."

traits.locale_text: "I'm no help to you here. You need to head to the Cage. It's our camp and the biggest outpost on Zarkov. Our capital, I suppose, or whatever it is you call large settlements."
"I'm no help to you here. You need to head to the Cage. It's our camp and the biggest outpost on Zarkov. Our capital, I suppose, or whatever it is you call large settlements."
"I'm no help to you here. You need to head to the Cage. It's our camp and the biggest outpost on Zarkov. Our capital, I suppose, or whatever it is you call large settlements."
"I'm no help to you here. You need to head to the Cage. It's our camp and the biggest outpost on Zarkov. Our capital, I suppose, or whatever it is you call large settlements."
"I'm no help to you there. You need to head to the Cage. It's our camp and the biggest outpost on Zarkov. Our capital, I suppose, or whatever it is you call large settlements."

languages.text: "Ich bin Euch hier keine Hilfe. Ihr müsst zum Käfig. Das ist unser Lager und der größte Außenposten auf Zarkov. Unsere Hauptstadt, schätze ich, oder wie auch immer Ihr große Siedlungen nennt."
languages.original_text: "I'm no help to you there. You need to head to the Cage. It's our camp and the biggest outpost on Zarkov. Our capital, I suppose, or whatever it is you call large settlements."

traits.locale_text: "Ich bin Euch hier keine Hilfe. Ihr müsst zum Käfig. Das ist unser Lager und der größte Außenposten auf Zarkov. Unsere Hauptstadt, schätze ich, oder wie auch immer Ihr große Siedlungen nennt."

languages.text: « Je ne peux rien pour vous aider. Vous devez vous rendre à la Cage, notre camp, et le plus grand avant-poste de Zarkov. Notre capitale, en somme, ou quel que soit le nom que vous donnez aux colonies d'importance. »
languages.original_text: "I'm no help to you there. You need to head to the Cage. It's our camp and the biggest outpost on Zarkov. Our capital, I suppose, or whatever it is you call large settlements."

traits.locale_text: « Je ne peux rien pour vous aider. Vous devez vous rendre à la Cage, notre camp, et le plus grand avant-poste de Zarkov. Notre capitale, en somme, ou quel que soit le nom que vous donnez aux colonies d'importance. »

languages.text: «No puedo ayudarle con eso. Tiene que ir a la Jaula, nuestro campamento y el mayor puesto de Zarkov. La capital, supongo, o como llame a los asentamientos más grandes».
languages.original_text: "I'm no help to you there. You need to head to the Cage. It's our camp and the biggest outpost on Zarkov. Our capital, I suppose, or whatever it is you call large settlements."

traits.locale_text: «No puedo ayudarle con eso. Tiene que ir a la Jaula, nuestro campamento y el mayor puesto de Zarkov. La capital, supongo, o como llame a los asentamientos más grandes».

languages.text: "Orada size yardım edemem. Kafes'e gitmem gerek. Orası kampımız, Zarkov'daki en büyük karakol. Sanırım başkentimiz ya da siz büyük yerleşimlere her ne diyorsanız o."
languages.original_text: "I'm no help to you there. You need to head to the Cage. It's our camp and the biggest outpost on Zarkov. Our capital, I suppose, or whatever it is you call large settlements."

traits.locale_text: "Orada size yardım edemem. Kafes'e gitmem gerek. Orası kampımız, Zarkov'daki en büyük karakol. Sanırım başkentimiz ya da siz büyük yerleşimlere her ne diyorsanız o."

languages.text: “这我可帮不上您。您得去牢笼。那是我们的营地，也是扎尔科夫上最大的前哨站。我想，应该算是我们的首都吧，总之是一个比较大的定居点。”
languages.original_text: "I'm no help to you there. You need to head to the Cage. It's our camp and the biggest outpost on Zarkov. Our capital, I suppose, or whatever it is you call large settlements."

traits.locale_text: “这我可帮不上您。您得去牢笼。那是我们的营地，也是扎尔科夫上最大的前哨站。我想，应该算是我们的首都吧，总之是一个比较大的定居点。”

languages.text: 「私はここであなたに役立つことはできません。あなたはケージに向かう必要があります。ケージは私たちのキャンプで、ザルコフで最も大きな拠点です。おそらく、私たちの首都でしょう。あるいは、あなたが大きな集落と呼ぶものかもしれません。」
languages.original_text: "I'm no help to you here. You need to head to the Cage. It's our camp and the biggest outpost on Zarkov. Our capital, I suppose, or whatever it is you call large settlements."

traits.locale_text: 「私はここであなたに役立つことはできません。あなたはケージに向かう必要があります。ケージは私たちのキャンプで、ザルコフで最も大きな拠点です。おそらく、私たちの首都でしょう。あるいは、あなたが大きな集落と呼ぶものかもしれません。」
